summary: Auto-generated TypeScript SDK bindings for the Palantir Foundry and Gotham REST APIs, published as @osdk/foundry.{namespace} packages on NPM. The monorepo contains ~45 packages organized by API namespace (ontologies, admin, datasets, connectivity, aipagents, languagemodels, etc.), each generated from OpenAPI IR specifications via a custom platform-sdk-generator tool. The SDK uses a thin shared networking layer (foundryPlatformFetch) that wraps platform API calls with URL templating, query/body/header serialization, and OAuth2 client authentication. The ontologies namespace is the largest and most complex, containing 600+ type definitions covering the full Ontology data model including Object Types, Properties, Link Types, Actions, Queries, Interfaces, ObjectSets, and real-time subscriptions.

ontologyConcepts.evidence: ObjectType/ObjectTypeV2 interfaces define the schema for ontology entities with apiName, primaryKey, properties (Record<PropertyApiName, PropertyV2>), rid, displayName, status, visibility, icon, titleProperty, and pluralDisplayName. ObjectTypeFullMetadata extends this with linkTypes, implementsInterfaces, implementsInterfaces2, and sharedPropertyTypeMapping. Full CRUD API: list, get, getFullMetadata, getEditsHistory, listOutgoingLinkTypes, getOutgoingLinkType.

PropertyV2 defines property metadata with description, displayName, dataType (ObjectPropertyType union), rid, status (Active/Deprecated/Experimental/Example), visibility, valueTypeApiName, valueFormatting, and typeClasses. ObjectPropertyType is a large discriminated union covering string, boolean, integer, long, double, decimal, date, timestamp, byte, short, float, geopoint, geoshape, array, set, map, struct, attachment, timeseries, marking, cipherText, vector, mediaReference, and geotimeSeriesReference. Properties support security markings (PropertySecurity with conjunctive/disjunctive marking sets) and formatting rules.

LinkTypeSideV2 defines link relationships with apiName, displayName, status, objectTypeApiName (target), cardinality (ONE|MANY), foreignKeyPropertyApiName, and linkTypeRid. Links are directional - accessed as outgoing link types from an object type. LinkedObjectV2 API provides listLinkedObjects and getLinkedObject to traverse links. ObjectSet loadLinks endpoint enables bulk link loading. InterfaceLinkType extends this pattern for interface-level links with rid, cardinality, required flag, and linkedEntityApiName.

ActionTypeV2 defines executable operations with apiName, parameters (Record<ParameterId, ActionParameterV2>), operations (LogicRule[]), rid, status, displayName, description, and toolDescription. ActionLogicRule is a discriminated union of 13 edit types: createObject, modifyObject, deleteObject, createLink, deleteLink, createInterface, modifyInterface, createOrModifyObject (v1/v2), function, batchedFunction, createInterfaceLink, deleteInterfaceLink. ActionParameterV2 supports 18+ data types including object references, interface objects, objectSets, structs. API supports apply (sync), applyAsync, applyBatch, applyWithOverrides, and validate.

QueryTypeV2 defines server-side functions with apiName, parameters (Record<ParameterId, QueryParameterV2>), output (QueryDataType), rid, version. QueryDataType is a discriminated union covering date, struct, set, string, double, integer, long, array, boolean, attachment, float, timestamp, objectSet, union, object, byte, decimal, short, marking. Queries are executed via POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/queries/{queryApiName}/execute with version pinning. Functions package (foundry.functions) provides additional Query and ValueType APIs with streaming support.

Multi-layered security model: (1) OAuth2 scopes per endpoint (api:ontologies-read, api:ontologies-write), (2) Marking-based access via PropertySecurity with conjunctive/disjunctive marking summaries per property value and container, (3) Admin API (foundry.admin) for managing Users, Groups, Roles, Organizations, Markings, MarkingCategories, MarkingMembers, MarkingRoleAssignments, Enrollments, AuthenticationProviders. MarkingCategoryType discriminates marking categories. GroupMemberConstraint validates action parameters against group membership. Detailed permission-denied error types per operation (EditObjectPermissionDenied, ViewObjectPermissionDenied, etc.).

Connectivity package (foundry.connectivity) provides full data integration APIs: Connections (JDBC, REST, S3, SMB, Snowflake, Databricks, etc. with authentication modes), FileImports, TableImports (with incremental state tracking), VirtualTables (BigQuery, Delta, Glue, Iceberg, Snowflake, Unity, Files). Datasets package (foundry.datasets) provides Dataset, Branch, Transaction, File, View, and Schema management APIs. OntologyTransaction API enables direct ontology edits via postEdits on transaction IDs. ObjectSet streaming subscriptions (ObjectSetStreamSubscribeRequest) support real-time data feeds.

Two packages for AI: (1) foundry.aipagents provides AIP Agent management with Agents, AgentVersions, Sessions (create, continue blocking/streaming, cancel), Contents, SessionTraces. Sessions support tool calls (ToolCall, ToolCallInput, ToolCallOutput), object context (ObjectContext), and RAG context (AgentSessionRagContextResponse, FunctionRetrievedContext). (2) foundry.languagemodels provides direct LLM access with Anthropic Messages API (AnthropicMessagesRequest/Response with full content types, tool use, thinking, citations, cache control) and OpenAI Embeddings API (OpenAiEmbeddingsRequest/Response).

InterfaceType defines abstract schemas that ObjectTypes can implement: rid, apiName, displayName, description, properties/allProperties (shared property types), propertiesV2/allPropertiesV2 (interface property types), extendsInterfaces/allExtendsInterfaces (inheritance), implementedByObjectTypes, links/allLinks (InterfaceLinkType). ObjectTypeFullMetadata tracks which interfaces are implemented via implementsInterfaces2 (Record<InterfaceTypeApiName, ObjectTypeInterfaceImplementation>) and sharedPropertyTypeMapping. API supports list, get, listObjectsForInterface, search, aggregate, listOutgoingInterfaceLinkTypes, getOutgoingInterfaceLinkType, listInterfaceLinkedObjects.

apiSurface.name: OntologiesV2.list
apiSurface.description: Lists all ontologies visible to the current user (GET /v2/ontologies)

apiSurface.name: OntologiesV2.get
apiSurface.description: Gets a specific ontology by API name or RID (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology})

apiSurface.name: OntologiesV2.getFullMetadata
apiSurface.description: Gets full ontology metadata including all object types, action types, query types, interfaces, shared properties, and value types in one request (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/fullMetadata)

apiSurface.name: OntologiesV2.loadMetadata
apiSurface.description: Loads ontology metadata for specific requested entity types (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/metadata)

apiSurface.name: ObjectTypesV2.list
apiSurface.description: Lists all object types in an ontology with pagination (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objectTypes)

apiSurface.name: ObjectTypesV2.get
apiSurface.description: Gets a specific object type by API name (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objectTypes/{objectType})

apiSurface.name: ObjectTypesV2.getFullMetadata
apiSurface.description: Gets full object type metadata including link types, implemented interfaces, and property mappings (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objectTypes/{objectType}/fullMetadata)

apiSurface.name: ObjectTypesV2.getEditsHistory
apiSurface.description: Returns edit history (additions, modifications, deletions) for objects of a type (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objectTypes/{objectType}/editsHistory)

apiSurface.name: ObjectTypesV2.listOutgoingLinkTypes
apiSurface.description: Lists outgoing link types for an object type (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objectTypes/{objectType}/outgoingLinkTypes)

apiSurface.name: ObjectTypesV2.getOutgoingLinkType
apiSurface.description: Gets a specific outgoing link type (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objectTypes/{objectType}/outgoingLinkTypes/{linkType})

apiSurface.name: OntologyObjectsV2.list
apiSurface.description: Lists objects of a given type with field selection, ordering, and pagination (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objects/{objectType})

apiSurface.name: OntologyObjectsV2.get
apiSurface.description: Gets a specific object by primary key (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objects/{objectType}/{primaryKey})

apiSurface.name: OntologyObjectsV2.count
apiSurface.description: Returns count of objects of a given type (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objects/{objectType}/count)

apiSurface.name: OntologyObjectsV2.search
apiSurface.description: Searches objects with structured queries (lt, gt, eq, isNull, contains, and, or, not, startsWith, containsAllTerms, etc.) (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objects/{objectType}/search)

apiSurface.name: OntologyObjectsV2.aggregate
apiSurface.description: Performs aggregation functions (avg, min, max, sum, count, approximateDistinct, exactDistinct, approximatePercentile) on object fields (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objects/{objectType}/aggregate)

apiSurface.name: LinkedObjectsV2.listLinkedObjects
apiSurface.description: Lists linked objects for a specific object and link type (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objects/{objectType}/{primaryKey}/links/{linkType})

apiSurface.name: LinkedObjectsV2.getLinkedObject
apiSurface.description: Gets a specific linked object by primary key (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objects/{objectType}/{primaryKey}/links/{linkType}/{linkedObjectPrimaryKey})

apiSurface.name: Actions.apply
apiSurface.description: Applies an action synchronously with parameters (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/actions/{action}/apply). Requires api:ontologies-read + api:ontologies-write scopes.

apiSurface.name: Actions.applyAsync
apiSurface.description: Applies an action asynchronously (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/actions/{action}/applyAsync)

apiSurface.name: Actions.applyBatch
apiSurface.description: Applies up to 20 actions of the same type in a batch (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/actions/{action}/applyBatch)

apiSurface.name: Actions.applyWithOverrides
apiSurface.description: Applies action with UniqueIdentifier and CurrentTime parameter overrides (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/actions/{action}/applyWithOverrides)

apiSurface.name: ActionTypesV2.list
apiSurface.description: Lists action types for an ontology (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/actionTypes)

apiSurface.name: ActionTypesV2.get
apiSurface.description: Gets action type by API name (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/actionTypes/{actionType})

apiSurface.name: ActionTypesV2.getByRid
apiSurface.description: Gets action type by RID (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/actionTypes/byRid/{actionTypeRid})

apiSurface.name: ActionTypesFullMetadata.list
apiSurface.description: Lists action types with full logic rule metadata, filtered by object type API names (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/actionTypesFullMetadata)

apiSurface.name: ActionTypesFullMetadata.get
apiSurface.description: Gets full metadata for an action type including logic rules (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/actionTypes/{actionType}/fullMetadata)

apiSurface.name: Queries.execute
apiSurface.description: Executes a query/function with parameters and optional version pinning (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/queries/{queryApiName}/execute)

apiSurface.name: QueryTypes.list
apiSurface.description: Lists query types for an ontology (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/queryTypes)

apiSurface.name: QueryTypes.get
apiSurface.description: Gets a query type by API name (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/queryTypes/{queryApiName})

apiSurface.name: OntologyInterfaces.list
apiSurface.description: Lists interface types for an ontology (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/interfaceTypes)

apiSurface.name: OntologyInterfaces.get
apiSurface.description: Gets a specific interface type (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/interfaceTypes/{interfaceType})

apiSurface.name: OntologyInterfaces.listObjectsForInterface
apiSurface.description: Lists objects implementing a given interface (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/interfaces/{interfaceType})

apiSurface.name: OntologyInterfaces.search
apiSurface.description: Searches objects via interface shared properties (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/interfaces/{interfaceType}/search)

apiSurface.name: OntologyInterfaces.aggregate
apiSurface.description: Aggregates objects via interface shared properties (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/interfaces/{interfaceType}/aggregate)

apiSurface.name: OntologyInterfaces.listOutgoingInterfaceLinkTypes
apiSurface.description: Lists outgoing interface link types (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/interfaceTypes/{interfaceType}/outgoingLinkTypes)

apiSurface.name: OntologyInterfaces.listInterfaceLinkedObjects
apiSurface.description: Lists linked objects traversing interface link types (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/interfaces/{interfaceType}/{objectType}/{primaryKey}/links/{interfaceLinkType})

apiSurface.name: OntologyObjectSets.load
apiSurface.description: Loads objects from an ObjectSet definition (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objectSets/loadObjects)

apiSurface.name: OntologyObjectSets.loadMultipleObjectTypes
apiSurface.description: Loads objects from ObjectSet with multiple object type/interface scoping (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objectSets/loadObjectsMultipleObjectTypes)

apiSurface.name: OntologyObjectSets.loadObjectsOrInterfaces
apiSurface.description: Loads objects viewed as interfaces or object types (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objectSets/loadObjectsOrInterfaces)

apiSurface.name: OntologyObjectSets.aggregate
apiSurface.description: Aggregates objects in an ObjectSet (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objectSets/aggregate)

apiSurface.name: OntologyObjectSets.loadLinks
apiSurface.description: Bulk loads links from an ObjectSet definition (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objectSets/loadLinks)

apiSurface.name: OntologyObjectSets.createTemporary
apiSurface.description: Creates a temporary ObjectSet that expires after one hour (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objectSets/createTemporary)

apiSurface.name: OntologyObjectSets.get
apiSurface.description: Gets an ObjectSet definition by RID (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/objectSets/{objectSetRid})

apiSurface.name: OntologyValueTypes.list
apiSurface.description: Lists value types for an ontology (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/valueTypes)

apiSurface.name: OntologyValueTypes.get
apiSurface.description: Gets a specific value type (GET /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/valueTypes/{valueType})

apiSurface.name: OntologyTransactions.postEdits
apiSurface.description: Applies ordered edits to an ontology transaction (POST /v2/ontologies/{ontology}/transactions/{transactionId}/edits)

apiSurface.name: foundryPlatformFetch
apiSurface.description: Core networking function that dispatches all API calls. Handles URL templating, HTTP method selection, body/query/header serialization, and error mapping to PalantirApiError.

apiSurface.name: createPlatformClient
apiSurface.description: Creates a standalone platform SDK client from stack URL and auth. From @osdk/client package (not in this repo).

apiSurface.name: createPublicOauthClient
apiSurface.description: Creates OAuth2 public client for authentication. From @osdk/oauth package (not in this repo).

architecturePatterns: OpenAPI-IR-to-TypeScript code generation: All SDK packages are auto-generated from OpenAPI intermediate representation using a custom platform-sdk-generator (scripts/getOpenApiIr.sh + scripts/generatePlatformSdk.sh). The generator produces _components.ts (types), _errors.ts (error types), and public/ API modules per namespace.

Compact method encoding: API methods are encoded as tuples [httpMethod, urlTemplate, flags?, contentType?, responseContentType?] where httpMethod is a numeric index (0=GET, 1=POST, etc.) and flags is a bitmask (1=hasBody, 2=hasQueryParams, 4=hasHeaderParams). URL parameters use {0}, {1} positional placeholders resolved by consuming args in order.

Namespace-per-package monorepo: Each Foundry API namespace becomes its own NPM package (@osdk/foundry.{namespace}) with a uniform structure: _components.ts for all type definitions, _errors.ts for error types, public/*.ts for API modules, and index.ts re-exporting everything. The @osdk/foundry umbrella re-exports all namespaces.

Dual client compatibility: All API functions accept both SharedClient (v2) and OldSharedClient (v1) via union types, enabling backward-compatible client evolution. The shared.net.platformapi layer resolves the correct clientContext via symbol-based protocol (symbolClientContext).

Discriminated union types throughout: All polymorphic types use TypeScript discriminated unions with a 'type' discriminant field. This applies to ObjectSet (15 variants), ActionLogicRule (13 variants), ActionParameterType (18 variants), QueryDataType, ObjectPropertyType, SearchJsonQueryV2, ValueTypeConstraint, and many more.

LooselyBrandedString pattern: Nominal typing for API identifiers (ObjectTypeApiName, PropertyApiName, OntologyRid, etc.) uses a LooselyBrandedString<T> = string & { __LOOSE_BRAND?: T } pattern that provides type safety without runtime cost while remaining assignable from plain strings.

Separation of Foundry vs Gotham platforms: getNamespacePlatform() maps each API namespace to 'foundry', 'gotham', or 'both', controlling which umbrella package (@osdk/foundry vs @osdk/gotham) includes each namespace. Core is shared between both platforms.

typeDefinitions.name: ObjectTypeV2
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { apiName: ObjectTypeApiName; displayName: DisplayName; status: ReleaseStatus; description?: string; pluralDisplayName: string; icon: Icon; primaryKey: PropertyApiName; properties: Record<PropertyApiName, PropertyV2>; rid: ObjectTypeRid; titleProperty: PropertyApiName; visibility?: ObjectTypeVisibility }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Defines the schema for an Ontology object type with its properties, primary key, display metadata, and release status

typeDefinitions.name: ObjectTypeFullMetadata
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { objectType: ObjectTypeV2; linkTypes: Array<LinkTypeSideV2>; implementsInterfaces: Array<InterfaceTypeApiName>; implementsInterfaces2: Record<InterfaceTypeApiName, ObjectTypeInterfaceImplementation>; sharedPropertyTypeMapping: Record<SharedPropertyTypeApiName, PropertyApiName> }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Complete metadata for an object type including link types, interface implementations, and shared property mappings

typeDefinitions.name: PropertyV2
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { description?: string; displayName?: DisplayName; dataType: ObjectPropertyType; rid: PropertyTypeRid; status?: PropertyTypeStatus; visibility?: PropertyTypeVisibility; valueTypeApiName?: ValueTypeApiName; valueFormatting?: PropertyValueFormattingRule; typeClasses: Array<TypeClass> }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Defines a property on an object type with its data type, formatting rules, value type reference, and visibility

typeDefinitions.name: LinkTypeSideV2
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { apiName: LinkTypeApiName; displayName: DisplayName; status: ReleaseStatus; objectTypeApiName: ObjectTypeApiName; cardinality: 'ONE' | 'MANY'; foreignKeyPropertyApiName?: PropertyApiName; linkTypeRid: LinkTypeRid }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Defines one side of a link relationship between object types with cardinality and optional foreign key

typeDefinitions.name: ActionTypeV2
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { apiName: ActionTypeApiName; description?: string; displayName?: DisplayName; status: ReleaseStatus; parameters: Record<ParameterId, ActionParameterV2>; rid: ActionTypeRid; operations: Array<LogicRule>; toolDescription?: string }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Defines an action type with its parameters, logic rules, and optional tool description for AI agents

typeDefinitions.name: ActionTypeFullMetadata
typeDefinitions.purpose: Full action type metadata including detailed logic rules (13 discriminated union variants for CRUD operations)

typeDefinitions.name: InterfaceType
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { rid: InterfaceTypeRid; apiName: InterfaceTypeApiName; displayName: DisplayName; description?: string; properties: Record<SharedPropertyTypeApiName, InterfaceSharedPropertyType>; allProperties: ...; propertiesV2: Record<InterfacePropertyApiName, InterfacePropertyType>; allPropertiesV2: ...; extendsInterfaces: Array<InterfaceTypeApiName>; allExtendsInterfaces: ...; implementedByObjectTypes: Array<ObjectTypeApiName>; links: Record<InterfaceLinkTypeApiName, InterfaceLinkType>; allLinks: ... }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Defines an abstract interface that object types can implement, with inherited properties, links, and extension hierarchy

typeDefinitions.name: InterfaceLinkType
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { rid: InterfaceLinkTypeRid; apiName: InterfaceLinkTypeApiName; displayName: DisplayName; description?: string; linkedEntityApiName: InterfaceLinkTypeLinkedEntityApiName; cardinality: InterfaceLinkTypeCardinality; required: boolean }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Defines a link type at the interface level with cardinality and required constraints

typeDefinitions.name: QueryTypeV2
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { apiName: QueryApiName; description?: string; displayName?: DisplayName; parameters: Record<ParameterId, QueryParameterV2>; output: QueryDataType; rid: FunctionRid; version: FunctionVersion }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Defines a server-side query/function with typed parameters and output

typeDefinitions.name: OntologyFullMetadata
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { ontology: OntologyV2; objectTypes: Record<ObjectTypeApiName, ObjectTypeFullMetadata>; actionTypes: Record<ActionTypeApiName, ActionTypeV2>; queryTypes: Record<VersionedQueryTypeApiName, QueryTypeV2>; interfaceTypes: Record<InterfaceTypeApiName, InterfaceType>; sharedPropertyTypes: Record<SharedPropertyTypeApiName, SharedPropertyType>; branch?: BranchMetadata; valueTypes: Record<ValueTypeApiName, OntologyValueType> }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Complete ontology metadata dump containing all entity types - designed for OSDK workflows to fetch everything in one request

typeDefinitions.name: OntologyV2
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { apiName: OntologyApiName; displayName: DisplayName; description: string; rid: OntologyRid }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Top-level ontology container with API name and resource identifier

typeDefinitions.name: OntologyObjectV2
typeDefinitions.purpose: Runtime representation of an ontology object instance as a property name to value map

typeDefinitions.name: ObjectSet
typeDefinitions.definition: type = { type: 'base' } & ObjectSetBaseType | { type: 'filter' } & ObjectSetFilterType | { type: 'union' } & ObjectSetUnionType | { type: 'intersect' } & ObjectSetIntersectionType | { type: 'subtract' } & ObjectSetSubtractType | { type: 'searchAround' } & ObjectSetSearchAroundType | { type: 'static' } & ObjectSetStaticType | { type: 'reference' } & ObjectSetReferenceType | { type: 'interfaceBase' } | { type: 'asType' } | { type: 'nearestNeighbors' } | { type: 'methodInput' } | { type: 'withProperties' } | { type: 'interfaceLinkSearchAround' } | { type: 'asBaseObjectTypes' }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Composable object set algebra with 15 variants for filtering, set operations, link traversal, type casting, and vector search

typeDefinitions.name: ActionLogicRule
typeDefinitions.definition: type = { type: 'createObject' } | { type: 'modifyObject' } | { type: 'deleteObject' } | { type: 'createLink' } | { type: 'deleteLink' } | { type: 'createInterface' } | { type: 'modifyInterface' } | { type: 'createOrModifyObject' } | { type: 'createOrModifyObjectV2' } | { type: 'function' } | { type: 'batchedFunction' } | { type: 'createInterfaceLink' } | { type: 'deleteInterfaceLink' }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Discriminated union of 13 action edit operation types describing what an action does when executed

typeDefinitions.name: PropertySecurity
typeDefinitions.definition: type = { type: 'propertyMarkingSummary' } & PropertyMarkingSummary | { type: 'unsupportedPolicy' } & UnsupportedPolicy | { type: 'errorComputingSecurity' } & ErrorComputingSecurity
typeDefinitions.purpose: Security policy on individual property values using conjunctive/disjunctive marking sets

typeDefinitions.name: OntologyValueType
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { apiName: ValueTypeApiName; displayName: DisplayName; description?: string; rid: ValueTypeRid; status?: ValueTypeStatus; fieldType: ValueTypeFieldType; version: string; constraints: Array<ValueTypeConstraint> }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Custom reusable value types with field type definitions and validation constraints

typeDefinitions.name: FoundryPlatformMethod<F>
typeDefinitions.definition: type = [method: number, path: string, flags?: number, contentType?: string, responseContentType?: string] & { __funcBrand?: F }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Compact tuple encoding for API endpoint metadata - HTTP method, URL template, and flags bitmask for body/query/header params

typeDefinitions.name: LooselyBrandedString<T>
typeDefinitions.purpose: Nominal typing pattern for API identifiers that is assignable from plain strings but provides type-level distinction

typeDefinitions.name: ObjectSetStreamSubscribeRequest
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { objectSet: ObjectSet; propertySet: Array<SelectedPropertyApiName>; referenceSet: Array<SelectedPropertyApiName>; objectLoadingResponseOptions?: ObjectLoadingResponseOptions }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Real-time subscription to object set changes via streaming
